source_pr.title: store/tikv: move snapshot_test to tests
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
store/tikv has dependencies on `mockstore` and `unistore` because tests need to use them. We can resolve it by moving all tests to standaline package.

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- move test files into `store/tikv/tests`

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

root_cause_explanation: The snapshot tests accessed commit timestamp state that can be updated concurrently (e.g., reading/writing `commitTS` directly), triggering data races under CI/race builds. This PR stabilizes the tests by using atomic load/store accessors for `commitTS` and updating the test to use the safe accessor (`GetCommitTS`) instead of direct field reads.
fix_pattern: Use atomic load/store accessors (and avoid direct field access) for concurrently-updated commit timestamp fields in TiKV test probes to eliminate data races.
analysis:

Patch series analyzed; see patch_url.
